title: HyperKaisen
body:
Hyper Kaisen Jujutsu Craft Addon
 

Server-side addon for Jujutsu Craft (Sorcery Fight). Adds operator commands, configurable gamerules, binding vows, and unlockable techniques for server owners, mapmakers, and anyone who wants more control over JJC mechanics.

Commands
All commands require operator permissions (level 2). Settings persist across sessions.
Black Flash Chance
Customize the Black Flash trigger chance per player.
/setblackflash <player> <chance> (0 to 100, vanilla JJC is around 0.2)
/setblackflash reset <player>
/getblackflash <player>
 

Technique Damage Multiplier
Scale technique damage per player.
/setdamagemult <player> <multiplier> (0.1 to 100)
/setdamagemult reset <player>
 

Cursed Energy Override
Control a player's cursed energy directly.
/setce <player> <value> (locks CE at a fixed value)
/setce max <player> <value> (sets max CE)
/setce unlock <player> (removes the lock)
/setce get <player>
Technique Lock
Prevents a player from changing their cursed technique. Blocks both the item and the keybind.
/locktechnique <player>
/unlocktechnique <player>



Gamerules
 

hyperRCT (default: true) - enables/disables Auto RCT and related features
hyperBindingVow (default: true) - enables/disables Binding Vows
hyperRCTcost (default: 5) - CE cost per tick for RCT (applies to both manual and auto)

Binding Vows

Activated through the in-game menu (H key > Binding Vows). Only one vow can be active at a time.
 

Fragile Vessel - trade durability for immediate pressure
Exchange of Survival - free CE recovery at the cost of health
Burst Window - short offensive window followed by a lockout period
Steady Output - safe sustained-state vow, increased damage taken
Blood Exchange - converts health into cursed energy on demand
Unlockable Techniques
 

Maximum Domain
Evolved version of Simple Domain. Larger radius, 30 second duration, Falling Blossom Emotion stays active for the entire cast. Unlocked after using Simple Domain 100 times. Shows up under the Hyper Kaisen advancement tab.
 

Resonant Healing
Allows you to heal other players, NPCs, and mobs by aiming at them and pressing the RCT key (M). Applies the real RCT mob effect to the target. Costs 20 CE per use, 3 second cooldown, 12 block range. Unlocked after using RCT 150 times (requires both RCT 1 and RCT 2 advancements). Also listed under Hyper Kaisen advancements.



Requirements
 

Minecraft 1.20.1
Forge 47.3.0+
Sorcery Fight (Jujutsu Craft) mod

Join dc for info> https://discord.gg/FtsbPZp4
